title: Housing Bill With CBDC Ban Becomes Law Without Trump's Signature
dek: A housing bill containing a ban on a Federal Reserve-issued central bank digital currency has become law without President Trump's signature. The statutory ban is in effect until 2031. Reporting frames it as a durable structural shift in US digital-dollar policy.
author: Crypto Cronkite
key_fact: A CBDC ban is now law until 2031, enacted via a housing bill that passed without the president's signature.
body: A housing bill that includes a ban on a Federal Reserve-issued central bank digital currency has passed into law without President Trump's signature, according to multiple outlets.
The statutory ban on a CBDC is now in effect until 2031. Reporting describes the measure as a durable structural change in US digital-dollar policy.
